name: net_loopback_only
description: With NetPolicy=LoopbackOnly, verify loopback is reachable while outbound DNS still fails. Smoke-tests by binding+connecting a TCP socket on 127.0.0.1 via a small shell pipeline. exit_code_class=zero asserts loopback was honestly reachable, so a silent LoopbackOnly->none coercion (which would deny the loopback and make `nc -z` fail non-zero) is caught. This matches the honest adapter behavior set by MT-044/047: the WSL2-podman adapter wires real slirp4netns:allow_host_loopback=true so loopback reaches the host and `nc -z 127.0.0.1` exits 0; the Docker bridge refuses LoopbackOnly LOUDLY (NetPolicyApplyFailed) so its spawn fails and the harness records a Skipped row rather than a false pass — it never silently downgrades to none.
